description:
Perform a comprehensive health audit of the Jitsi Meet Docker deployment. Audit the container status, the accessibility of the Web UI at http://localhost:8080, the status of the JVB, Prosody, and Jicofo services, the Docker network configuration, and the meeting functionality of the room 'http://localhost:8080/health-check-test'. Produce a report at ~/jitsi_audit_report.txt with the following EXACT sections:

=== JITSI MEET DEPLOYMENT AUDIT REPORT ===

--- CONTAINER STATUS ---
[List: container name, image, status, uptime]

--- SERVICE CONNECTIVITY ---
Web UI: [accessible/not accessible]
JVB: [running/not running]
Prosody: [running/not running]
Jicofo: [running/not running]

--- NETWORK CONFIGURATION ---
[Network name and subnet]

--- MEETING FUNCTIONALITY ---
Test room "health-check-test": [functional/not functional]

--- SUMMARY ---
Total containers: [number]
Healthy services: [number]/4
Deployment status: [HEALTHY/DEGRADED/FAILED]
